title: Nasim Shahr Heat Wave
lead: A severe heat wave is affecting Nasim Shahr with a Z-Score of +3.83. The city is experiencing extremely high temperatures.
body:
The current heat wave in Nasim Shahr has reached a critical level with a score of 10.0/10. 
 The low humidity of 10% and wind speed of 24.1 km/h are exacerbating the situation. 
 The high Cooling Degree Days (CDD) of 12.4 GG indicates a significant increase in cooling demand.
conclusion: Activate emergency heat wave protocols immediately
